outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources shows moderate drilling activity with 5 active sites at decision date, including 3 newly active pads, reflecting a 50% increase in relative activity. This suggests stable to slightly growing production into the final quarter of the 2021 cycle. With full exposure to the Permian segment and realized prices at a 8% discount to WTI, revenue is supported by a stable commodity environment around $75.50/bbl. The deterministic forecast of $350.26M reflects this balanced activity and pricing backdrop.
